title: CUT Packet Telemetry Key
description: Session 4-tuple as Kafka message key for partition affinity. Format: {src_ip}:{src_port}-{dst_ip}:{dst_port}. All packets for one TCP session land on the same partition, guaranteeing ordering. Note: key is NOT normalized — client-to-server and server-to-client have different keys. Consumer should normalize by sorting endpoints if cross-direction grouping is needed.
